creator: gblach@FreeBSD.org
text:
Currently I can't explain what is a reason of this bug.  I've received pkg-fallout logs, but on my local poudriere on clean environment everything is ok:
https://people.freebsd.org/~gblach/logs/10.1-amd64-efl-1.12.2_3.log
https://people.freebsd.org/~gblach/logs/10.1-i386-efl-1.12.2_3.log

Before I can fix this bug I need to understand what is a reason.  Currently I have no idea what could be wrong.  Any suggestion might be helpful.
